sglang.title: EXAONE 3.0 Model Support
sglang.author: Deepfocused
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Hello, I am deepfocused from the AI ​​engineering Team at LG CNS.
we want to integrate the recently opened model EXAONE-3.0-7.8B-Instruct model into sglang.
Previously, we have been servicing models such as EXAONE v1, v2, etc. to our customers as sglang through the sglang + EXAONE build.

sglang.title: Update README Support Exaone 3.0
sglang.author: Deepfocused
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
To write in README.md that sglang can support LG-Exaone 3.0.

Modifications

vllm.title: Support vLLM single and multi-host TPUs on GKE
vllm.author: richardsliu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes a few issues with vLLM on TPUs using GKE and RayServe:

Installs ray dashboard and serve libraries in Docker image
Calculates the number of nodes based on current placement group instead of the entire Ray cluster (which may include non-TPU nodes)
Ensures TPU-specific environment variables are

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix import error in Exaone model
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This fixes the CI failure in models test due to #7819 being incompatible with #7652.

vllm.title: [VLM][Model] TP support for ViTs
vllm.author: ChristopherCho
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As a follow-up PR to #6942, I've implemented the TP version of various ViTs. The following models have been changed:

Siglip
Clip
Blip
Intern ViT

Following the Idefics2VisionAttention, I've used the memory_efficient_attention_forward from xformers.
To load the models correctly, the load_weights par

vllm.title: [Core] Increase default `max_num_batched_tokens` for multimodal models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Enabling chunked prefill causes some confusing errors for multimodal models as max_num_batched_tokens < num_multimodal_tokens leads to mismatched placeholder count when running the model.
This PR partially solves this issue by increasing the default max_num_batched_tokens for multimodal models so th

vllm.title: [Model] Adding support for MSFT Phi-3.5-MoE
vllm.author: wenxcs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add MSFT Phi-3.5-MoE Model Support.

Adding phimoe model;
Changing fusedmoe interface by adding a routing function, which is also applied to change fp8 and experts_int8 quantization interfaces.
Adding fusedmoe triton kernel config for phimoe intermediate size on h100.

FIX #7731
Fix an inference bug

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Address #8009 and add model test for flashinfer fp8 kv cache.
vllm.author: pavanimajety
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This addresses the bug described in #8009. Fix is to consistently replace the fp8 type right before we call into Flashinfer API.
Please note that this test is disabled because FP8 numerics are resulting in slightly different strings each run. But can be evaluated that the strings are essentially the

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix import error in Phi-3.5-MoE
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This fixes another CI failure in models test due to #7729 being incompatible with #7652.
